response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified the performer as Kazama Iroha in her birthday live. 2. Detected the song 'ray' being performed. 3. Used search tool to find the lyrics for 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN. 4. Created the JSON with scenes, lyrics, and metadata as required. 5. Adjusted the timing of the first scene to ensure end time is strictly greater than start time.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by a virtual performer where she sings 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN. The performance includes an introductory scene and concludes with a talk segment where the performer interacts with the audience regarding the next song.

scenes.description: The performer appears on stage and is introduced. She waves to the audience, setting the stage for her performance. The scene does not contain any vocal music.
The song 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN begins. The performer sings and dances on stage. The lyrics are displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
お別れしたのはもっと 前の事だったような
悲しい光は封じ込めて 踵すり減らしたんだ

君といた時は見えた 今は見えなくなった
透明な彗星をぼんやりと でもそれだけ探している

しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよ その時だけのメロディーを
寂しくなんかなかったよ ちゃんと寂しくなれたから

いつまでどこまでなんて 正常か異常かなんて
考える暇も無い程歩くのは大変だ
楽しい方がずっといいよ ごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だ あの痛みは 忘れたって消えやしない

理想で作った道を 現実が塗り替えていくよ
思い出はその軌跡の上で 輝きになって残っている

お別れしたのは何で 何のためだったんだろうな
悲しい光が僕の影を 前に長く伸ばしている

時々熱が出るよ 時間がある時眠るよ
夢だと解るその中で 君と会ってからまた行こう

晴天とはほど遠い 終わらない暗闇にも
星を思い浮かべたなら すぐ銀河の中だ

あまり泣かなくなっても 靴を新しくしても
大丈夫だ あの痛みは 忘れたって消えやしない

伝えたかった事が きっとあったんだろうな
恐らくありきたりなんだろうけど こんなにも

お別れした事は 出会った事と繋がっている
あの透明な彗星は 透明だから無くならない

◯×どれかなんて 皆と比べてどうかなんて
確かめる間も無い程生きるのは最高だ
あまり泣かなくなっても ごまかして笑っていくよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: The parting was something from even further back. I locked up the sad light and wore down my heels. I could see it when I was with you, but I can't see it anymore. I'm just looking for the transparent comet, that's all. I sang songs all the time, melodies for just that moment. I wasn't lonely, because I was able to be lonely properly. Walking so hard I don't even have time to think if it's normal or abnormal, or how long or how far... It's better to be having fun, I'll gloss over it and keep laughing. It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if you forget it. Reality is repainting the road built by ideals. The memories remain as radiance on that trajectory. Why did we part? What was it for? The sad light is stretching my shadow out long in front of me. Sometimes I get a fever, I sleep when I have time. Inside that dream where I know it's a dream, let's meet, then keep going. Even in the endless darkness that is far from a sunny sky, if I remember the stars, I'm already in the galaxy. Even if I don't cry as much anymore, even if I get new shoes, it's okay, that pain won't disappear even if you forget it. There must have been something I wanted to tell you. It's probably cliché, but I feel it this much. The fact that we parted is connected to the fact that we met. That transparent comet is transparent, so it won't disappear. Checking to see if it's a circle or an X, or how I compare to everyone else... I'm so busy living I don't have time to check. Even if I don't cry as much anymore, I'll gloss over it and keep laughing.

scenes.description: The performance ends. The performer talks to the audience, mentions her birthday live, and holds a voting segment for the next song.
